diff: The `RELAYER_ROLE` is the address for the Pattern Liquidity Layer ALM Planner off-chain system that calls functions on `Controller` contracts to perform actions on behalf of the `ALMProxy` contract. The Relayer Role may be granted to an address by any address holding the `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE`. The Relayer Role may be removed from an address by any address holding the `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` or the `FREEZER_ROLE`.
